steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The colon after the blank signals that the rest of the sentence explains the word. That elaboration says the delta is a "constantly evolving" network with channels and land that "change in size and shape." The blank must describe something characterized by continuous, ongoing change.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘immutable’: means unchanging — the exact opposite of what the passage describes. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘sustainable’: means able to be maintained over time; it says nothing about constant change. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘unrivaled’: means without equal — a claim of superiority, not a description of motion or change. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘dynamic’: means characterized by continuous change and activity, which perfectly matches "constantly evolving" channels that change size and shape. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
